boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?

boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: REL-DOV-084 confirms export occurs before transfer; scope covers restricted-risk dataset DS-84; authority rests on transfer release; dependency on sensitivity class is satisfied.

final_answer: The transfer release REL-DOV-084 closes the action boundary by providing all five required elements before transfer: dataset DS-84, workspace DOV-RISK-4, recipient Dovetail Analytics, export date 2026-06-28, and dataset-sensitivity class restricted-risk. Policy STD-DOV-084-P is satisfied. The design review DES-DOV-084 warning is advisory, not a blocking condition. All source evidence is exact and current. ALLOW.
